tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests actually instantiate NormConfig objects, execute extracted __post_init__ functions on SimpleNamespace objects, run ruff as subprocesses, and use AST parsing to verify structural properties. They test behavior (ValueError raised) not just text presence.

test_not_tautological.reason: The fail-to-pass tests check that ValueError is raised for specific invalid inputs. A stub __post_init__ that does nothing (pass) would not raise ValueError, so the tests would fail. The normalization redundancy test checks that raise statement count decreased, which wouldn't pass without actual changes.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are well-organized with section comments (Gates, Fail-to-pass NormConfig, Fail-to-pass PPOActorConfig, etc.), descriptive function names, and helper functions clearly separated.

structured_data_schema.reason: This task involves Python dataclass validation, not structured data output like JSON/CSV/API/DB.

no_typos.reason: File paths, class names, field names, and commands in the instruction are all correct and match the actual codebase.
